title: Ast
description: Abstract Syntax Tree for SEA DSL

AstNode.description: AST Node types representing all SEA DSL declarations

body.description: Optional typed body `entity "X" { ... }`. Absent on legacy bodyless entities so existing AST JSON stays byte-identical.

oneOf.description: Flow declaration - resource transfer between entities
Pattern declaration - named regex for string validation
Policy declaration - validation rule or constraint
Instance declaration - entity instance with field values
Cell declaration - isolated agent execution unit (cell-environment projection)
SystemDependency declaration - OS package or native library
Runtime declaration - language runtime or compiler toolchain
Tool declaration - package manager, task runner, or developer CLI
Service declaration - background or attached service
Enum declaration - closed set of named wires

value.description: Decimal value as string for precision

oneOf.description: Contextual `role<SymbolRef>` leaf (ADR-013 §2). Opaque until application policy evaluation resolves it.

FieldTypeRef.description: Alias-qualified symbol reference inside a field type. Stored verbatim until application resolution (Task 7).

ImportDecl.description: Import declaration for a module file

refresh_interval.description: Refresh interval in ISO 8601 duration format (e.g., "PT1H")

threshold.description: Decimal value as string for precision

OperationClause.description: Authored operation clause. Stored verbatim; the application module resolves and lowers each clause.

SpannedAstNode.description: Spanned AST node with source location information
